Lisa: Th-then I'm partly to blame, too! I... I just stood there and watched, without helping you at all...!
Ako: What...? Lisa... Did you know about the scout...?
Yukina: I'm the only one who knew about this. She is not to blame at all. Just be quiet, Lisa.
Lisa: No... No, I won't be quiet. I'm not gonna be quiet any more! I want you to stay in the band, Yukina. But this whole time, I couldn't do anything to help make that happen...
Sayo: ... I don't know what it is that you want, Minato-san.
Yukina: It's like you said. Everything I have done, all of the music, has all been to take part in Future World Fes...

Sayo: Future World Fes is our goal, yes. I'm doing my best to reach it, too... but, Minato-san. If everything you're doing is just to play at this festival... Then what exactly do you plan on doing after? I don't mean to be rude, but it sounds to me like you have no vision beyond that.
Ako: Huh...? But, then that would mean...
Sayo: Exactly. When all is said and done, we'll just be thrown away.
Lisa: Sayo, that's not—
Yukina: That's not true! I mean... maybe it was once, when I was looking for member, but... when I found you, Sayo... when we all came together, it became less about my father, and...
Sayo: ... Your father?
Lisa: Yukina...
Yukina: The truth is... I was using the band, the music, all of it for my own personal reasons.
Sayo: .. Personal reasons...
Yukina: ... It's a very long story. When my father was young, he was in a band...
Sayo: ... I've seen that band before, in magazines. They say they were huge back in the indie scene... I had no idea your father was a member, Minato-san.

Yukina: I formed Roselia with a promise to find our own brand of music, all the way while hiding my own personal reasons and deceiving you all... I couldn't quite put it into words last time, but... I know that I must take responsibility and quit the band. Because, unlike mine, your intentions are true.
Sayo: H-hold on, now...
Ako: I-I think...!
Yukina: ... However!! I know I don't deserve it... I know I lied about my ideals, my beliefs, hid my true feelings... but I still want us to play together...! All five of us!
Yukina: I want to stay with Roselia! ... I don't know how you all feel about that... I know it's incredibly selfish of me, but...

Sayo: You told me before. You said we cannot bring our personal feelings into the band. However... these feelings of yours... I can understand. Why we continue to play is one thing, but why we want to start in the first place...? Everyone has their own reasons.
Ako: Th-that's right! I only started because I wanted to be just like my sister! It's the same with you and your father, Minato-san!
Rinko: I... just wanted to... help myself to change...
Lisa: I just wanted to be with Yukina... but you all knew that♪
Sayo: Everyone has their issues. The reason we hold on to them is because we can't let go. All we can do is keep moving on... right?
Yukina: ... Sayo...
Sayo: I, too, want us to keep playing together.
Yukina: ...!
Ako: Huh? Does that mean... Roselia is back together?!
Sayo & Yukina: We never split up.
Sayo & Yukina: ...!
Lisa & Rinko: ... Fufu.Haha.
Sayo: We will enter the Future World Fes contest together, as Roselia. Is everyone okay with that?
Lisa, Ako & Rinko: Yes!
Yukina: ... Sayo... Everyone...

chapter_19.action: [Scene: Day of the Contest]
[Scene: Dressing Room]
Contest Staff: Would all contestants please make sure to be ready offstage five minutes before your performance times, please!
Contest Staff: And remember, this contest is a public event! We'll have a lot of people coming to watch you perform, so please try not let loose any backstage information.
Lisa: (Just like Sayo and Yukina said, we passed the application and sheet music checks... Now for the real performance...!) Oh no, no no no! I forgot my hairspray...!
Sayo: I tould you not to leave anything behind. ... Here.
Lisa: Oh... Thanks... (Sayo... I feel like she's softened up a lot recently... In fact... I think maybe everyone has...)
Ako: Are you okay, Rin-rin? The stage is really, really big, you know. You won't go turning blue like you always used to, will you?
Rinko: I... I know... But recently... As long as I'm with my keyboard... I feel fine...
Ako: I totally know what you mean! I feel invincible when I'm smashing those drums! All right, let's go show them just how hard we practiced!
Yukina: Ako. Try to calm down. There are a lot of other bands here.
Entrant 1: ... I always imagined Roselia to be a lot cooler, to be honest... They're surprisingly normal. Bit of a letdown.
Entrant 2: You think? I dunno, I prefer to see bands where the members are all close to one another. ... Oh hey, look at the TV!
Sayo & Lisa: ...!
Entrant 1: Oh, Pastel✽Palettes. They haven't even made their official debut yet,  but I feel like I see them everywhere I go. The guitarist and drummer seem really talented, huh.
Sayo: (... Yeah, so what? I am here to do my own thing...) Imai-san. Are you finished with the hairspray? I need to use it, too.

Lisa: Huh? Oh, yeah... Here. (Sayo's not bothered by Hina. Rinko's not bothered by crowds... Ako looks as happy as ever. We're about to start the contest, and everyone's so relaxed...) How about you, Yukina...? ... Huh? Yukina?
[Scene: Live House - Outside]
Lisa: Hey, Yukina~! Everyone said you'de be first in the dressing room preparing for the show. I was looking all over for you!
Yukina: However much we prepare, it'll go how it goes.
Lisa: What~? You are the leader of Roselia, right? That wasn't exactly inspiring, you know!
Yukina: Practice is all that matters. Whatever the result.
Lisa: Yukina... (Is she just too used to the stage? No... Yukina's put everything she has into performing at Future World Fes...)
Yukina: What? You're staring.
Lisa: No, I just... You look so... relaxed.
Yukina: ... I am. It feels good not to be hiding anything any more.
Lisa: (I'm so glad... I guess I was right to interfere after all...)
Yukina: Lisa. ... Thank you.
Lisa: That's good☆ ... Huh, no, wait... What?!
Yukina: It's time. Let's head back.
Lisa: Wait... No, hold on a second...! (That's no good! She can't go telling me stuff like that now...)
[Scene: Dressing Room]
Sayo: Five minutes.
Yukina: I'm ready to go. ... Lisa?
Lisa: Huh?! Y-yeah! I-I'm totally fine~! Hahaha!
Yukina: Lisa...
Ako: Lisa, you're not... getting nervous, are you...?
Lisa: M-me...? Of course not~. Not at all~~!!
All (except Lisa): ...
Staff: Roselia to the stage, please.
All: Okay!
Lisa: (I don't have anywhere near enough experience or hours of practice under my belt... but if I slip up now, then everyone else's efforts will have been for nothing...)
Sayo: Imai-san. If you stare at the floor like that, you'll hit someone with your bass... Face forward.
Lisa: ... Face... forward... (She's right. I just need to face this head on.) Thank you, Sayo...
Ako: All right! Let's go, Roselia! Ohhh~! ... Come on everything, together!
Rinko & Lisa: Ohh~...
Sayo & Yukina: That's enough of that.
[Scene: Onstage]
Sayo: (What is this feeling...? I... I don't think I've ever felt this... This at peace before...)
Yukina: (... I have no thoughts, my mind is clear... All I need is to sing...)
Lisa: (Th-this is so fun...! It's like a dream! I was so nervous before, but... together with this band...)
Ako: (It is true after all! Roselia has this special magic that just makes me so, so, so so so incredibly cool...!!)
Rinko: (... The crowds... The lights... They don't bother me at all... As long as I am with Roselia... I feel like I am strong...)

chapter_20.action: [Scene: Restaurant]
Yukina & Sayo: ...
Lisa: Come on, you two~... Do you have to be so cool all the time~?
Sayo: If we were, we wouldn't come to a place like this.
Yukina: Very true.
Ako: True true! So, Sayo-san, Yukina-san, will it be the "Double Hamburger Steak with Fried Shrimp and Chick Saute with Extra Rice plus Dessert" for you, too?
Yukina & Sayo: ...
Lisa: All right! That makes five of us, then. Order up, Rinko♪
Rinko: Okay. ... The Super Binge Set... For five people, please...
Yukina & Sayo: ...
Lisa: (And to think, just earlier...)
[Scene: Contest Results]
MC: ... and entry No. 15. That makes all the bands that will be moving on.
Entrant: Hey... Roselia weren't called, were they? Everyone said they were sure winners...
Sayo: (We... we...)
Yukina: (... Failed...!)
Lisa & Rinko: ...!!
MC: Any bands who would like to hear feedback on their performance, please stay behind after the show. So, that's it, ladies and gentlemen...
Ako: ... But why? Yukina-san...
Yukina: ... Let's hear this feedback first. We can ask questions later.
Judge 1: It was a wonderful performance. Honestly one of the best of this event.
Sayo: ...! So then... why did we not pass...?
Judge 2: It seems you only very recently formed this band.
Yukina: That's true... But we practiced just as hard as anyone else.
Judge 1: We know. That's why we don't want you to scrape through preliminaries and such. We want you to win and stand up on that main stage.
Judge 2: You know that Future World Fes is not just any music festival. We are looking to bring up the next genertion of musicians in our genre.
Judge 1: You are a young and stylish group. I'm sure a lot of noise will be made about you. But the scene is just not ready for you yet.
Judge 2: In such a short time since your formation, and with such little practice, you have managed to impress us all with your sound. Roselia, you will go far...
Judge 1: We want you to come back again next year and show us a refined and practiced sound.
Lisa: I know we failed, but they did have a lot of nice things to say about us... I'm not too upset about it.
Server: Here you go, folks~! Double Hamburger Steak with Fried Shrimp and Chick Saute with Extra Rice plus Dessert sets~.
Sayo: I'm not happy with it at all... *nom*
Yukina: Me neither. If they really do want to encourage new talent, they should have let us win and move on to bigger things... *nom*
Sayo & Yukina: (Although...)
Ako: *nom* ... I mean, it does really suck, but to be honest... it was so much fun that I don't even care!
Lisa: Ahh... I think I might agree, y'know...
Rinko: Me too... It was the most exciting... so far....
Sayo & Yukina: ...!
Sayo: Wh-what are you saying? Don't you remember what it is we did all of that practicing for?

Yukina: Roselia exists to bring out of us the best music that we can possibly create... (... I spent all this time thinking only about my father, believing I was doing all of this for him... but once I started singing, I... wasn't thinking about anything at all...) ... I don't care who praises us for what. I will not be pleased with my performance until I am up on the stage that my father could not reach.
Lisa: ...
Sayo: (I... I was so focused on the show that I forgot all about trying to beat Hina, too...) Yes... Me too, I......? Sorry, can I help you?
Customer: U-umm... Are you related to Pastel✽Palettes' Hina-chan? You just look so much like her...!
Sayo: ... I'm her sister.
Customer: Kya~! She really does have a sister! Wow... Th-thank you very much!
Sayo: (... I'm just the same as Minato-san... I'll never escape from Hina's shadow...)
Lisa: (I have to keep going... Until Yukina can laugh and smile about her father again...)
Rinko: I... I want to play at Future World Fes... with everyone, too. It's been... just so much fun so far...

Lisa: Rinko... Me too...! I wanna stay with this band for a lot longer yet! Because, you're right, it's just such great fun to play! (And I want Yukina... and Sayo, too... to feel the same way too some day...)
Ako: Me too, me too! I think today I started to really understand what Sayo-san meant by me finding my own brand of cool... and I think I can use it to win...!
All: ...
Sayo: ... We all have our different reasons, but...
Yukina: We will enter the contest again next year. And we will win. That's one feeling that we do all share.
Lisa: ... Hehe. I guess that means we're all fully devoting ourselves to Roselia! And if we hit any problems again, we can always come back to solve them!
Sayo & Yukina: Absolutely not.
Sayo & Yukina: ...!
Sayo: I'm going to be practicing even harder just so we never have to come to this place again. We don't have the time to waste, anyway. Let's go home.
Lisa & Ako: Aww~, just a little longer~...
Yukina: There is no room for friendship in Roselia. If you want to play around, you can go ahead and leave.
